description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a retro design with a predominantly purple exterior accented by yellow and blue horizontal stripes. The front panel includes a large, slightly curved display screen framed by a marquee labeled 'Dead Wood Park' in red text on a white background. Below the screen, the control panel is equipped with two red-topped joysticks and multiple orange and yellow buttons, arranged for two-player gameplay. The lower section of the cabinet is finished with a wood-textured panel, adding a classic touch to its appearance. The sides and back of the cabinet are plain, with no visible graphics or decals, and the overall structure is boxy with a slightly tapered base. The cabinet appears sturdy and is likely constructed from a combination of wood, plastic, and metal components.
description: A retro-style purple arcade game cabinet with a wood-textured base, a large display screen, and a control panel featuring two joysticks and multiple buttons. The marquee reads 'Dead Wood Park' and the sides are plain with colored stripes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marquee, display screen, dual joysticks, and button layout on the control panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cabinet's purple body, colored stripes, and the protruding control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain purple back with colored stripes and the wood-textured lower section.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cabinet's profile and control panel extension.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, large and slightly curved with a visible bezel around the display area.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two red-topped joysticks and six orange/yellow buttons arranged for two-player side-by-side play, with a colorful control panel surface.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the text 'Dead Wood Park' in red on a white background, framed by purple and cream accents, with a simple and clean design.
